scripts.lint: eslint web tests vite.config.js vitest.config.js eslint.config.js playwright.config.js
scripts.format:check: prettier --check web tests scripts package.json vite.config.js vitest.config.js eslint.config.js playwright.config.js
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run artifacts:verify && npm run language:check && npm run build
